landing.title: VaR Risk Desk Platform
landing.subtitle: A premium operating surface for FX VaR, validation, capital allocation, decisions and MT5 execution.
landing.supportTitle: Built for real desk posture, not for decorative dashboards.
landing.supportBody: The interface compresses the full monitoring loop into one operator-grade surface: current risk, model credibility, capital pressure, decision guidance and simulated execution.
landing.workflowLead: Every layer serves a single operational chain: measure, validate, allocate, decide, simulate.
landing.workflowMeasureBody: Historical, parametric, Monte Carlo, EWMA, FHS and GARCH VaR/ES on the same portfolio state.
landing.workflowValidateBody: Kupiec, Christoffersen, champion/challenger scoring and exception monitoring stay visible.
landing.workflowAllocateBody: Translate marginal and component risk into capital usage, headroom and rebalance actions.
landing.workflowDecideBody: Evaluate a proposed trade before execution and surface accept, reduce or reject with rationale.
landing.credibilityBody: The product keeps the quant engine intact and turns it into a clear command surface: tighter hierarchy, sparse copy, strong numbers and no dashboard noise.
landing.credibilityListOne: Model ranking, exception diagnostics and traffic-light posture
landing.credibilityListTwo: Per-pair attribution, capital slices and pressure points
landing.credibilityListThree: Decision history, audit trail and report continuity
landing.previewTitle: One workspace for the entire risk loop.
landing.previewBody: From desk overview to blotter and execution, every page uses the same visual grammar and the same backend source of truth.
landing.finalTitle: Deploy the desk, keep the risk logic.
landing.finalBody: FastAPI remains the source of truth. The new frontend simply gives the platform the product presence it deserves.
